subject: Geography
title: The Falkland Islands
description: Learn The Falkland Islands in one minute.

hook.text: Britain and Argentina fought a war in 1982 over islands 12,000 km from London.

buildup.text: Argentina calls them the Malvinas and claims them as stolen territory.

discovery.text: The 3,000 islanders voted 99.8% to remain British in a 2013 referendum.

twist.text: Oil was discovered nearby, raising the economic stakes of the dispute.

climax.text: Two nations, one archipelago, and a dispute that shows no sign of ending.

punchline.text: Tiny islands, massive egos, and oil underneath.

quiz.question: What do Argentinians call the Falkland Islands?
